/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/huffman_archive.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/huffman_archive.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/huffman_archive.dir/src/huffman.cpp.o CMakeFiles/huffman_archive.dir/src/encoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/huffman_archive.dir/src/decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/huffman_archive.dir/src/bitbuffer.cpp.o -o huffman_archive
